title: The False Alarm
description: Diabetic patient glucose alert. Anamnesis reveals planned dietary change - alert is benign.
key_ehr_facts: Physician note: expect transient glucose fluctuation during titration
key_anamnesis_facts: Patient attended celebration dinner last night
Fasting glucose this morning was 142 mg/dL

gold_standard_brief.primary_concern: Post-prandial glucose spike attributable to dietary deviation during medication titration. Likely benign.
